summaryPreview:
Relevant code evidence from `core/collection/timingwheel.go`:

```go
// NewTimingWheelWithClock returns a TimingWheel with given ticker.
func NewTimingWheelWithClock(interval time.Duration, numSlots int, execute Execute,
	ticker timex.Ticker) (*TimingWheel, error) {
	tw := &TimingWheel{
		interval:      interval,
		ticker:        ticker,
		slots:         make([]*list.List, numSlots),
		timers:        NewSafeMap(),
		tickedPos:     numSlots - 1, // at previous virtual circle
		execute:       execute,
		numSlots:      numSlots,
		setChannel:    make(chan timingEntry),
		moveChannel:   make(chan baseEntry),
		removeChannel: make(chan interface{}),
		drainChannel:  make(chan func(key, value interface{})),
		stopChannel:   make(chan lang.PlaceholderType),
	}

	tw.initSlots()
	go tw.run()

	return tw, nil
}
```

The function ends at line 97, immediately followed by:

